text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Mejiro Ryan and Mejiro McQueen finish
their run together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that felt great! I feel like I can do another
lap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed ... Your final sprint before the finish line
was quite splendid.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The power you displayed showed me your desire
to never be defeated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh-ho, really?! Thanks! It psychs me up to hear
you say that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can’t look like a fool in front of the people who
believe in me. Know what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I think of that, energy comes surging
into my body!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I believe I do know what you're saying...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You wanted to show off in front of your trainer
and pushed yourself extra hard, correct? How
cute.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Say what?! H-hey, it's not like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My trainer's always got my back, so I just wanna
return the favor is all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, so... Yeah! All that running is really making
me feel the burn!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Goodness... Hehe, though I must admit... I am a
little envious.
